_project: 100 Gbps WDM Photonics System with FPGA Supervisory Control
_description: Complete configuration for final submission — Anderson (2023) enhancements enabled

_operation_mode_options.CALIBRATION: Full session — EDFA gain sweep + MZM drift recovery + drift check. Use this for your project run.
_operation_mode_options.OPERATIONAL: MZM correction only. Skip EDFA. Use when EDFA is already calibrated.
_operation_mode_options.MONITORING: Read-only. Log Q and predict drift. No parameter changes.

supervisory._q_excellent_note: Set to 7.2 to match real results Q approx 7.4-7.5. Was incorrectly 9.0 in earlier versions.

mzm_transfer_model._vpi_note: CRITICAL. Vpi = 4.0 V as specified in project documentation Chapter 8. DO NOT change to 1.0 V. Wrong Vpi makes all operating point classifications and normalised bias values physically incorrect.
mzm_transfer_model._vac_note: Pilot-tone AC amplitude approx 2 percent of Vpi = 0.08 V. Used in Bessel function harmonic ratio calculation. Anderson 2023 Eq 4.4 and 4.5.
mzm_transfer_model._ewma_note: EWMA weight on newest sample. 0.3 means stable smoothing. Anderson 2023 Section 4.4.
mzm_transfer_model._threshold_note: Operating point thresholds as fraction of Vpi. At Vpi=4.0V: peak zone V < 0.6V, quadrature zone 1.4V to 2.6V, null zone 3.4V to 4.6V

ann_drift_predictor._enabled_note: Set false to force linear regression only.
ann_drift_predictor._window_note: Number of recent Q values fed as ANN input window.
ann_drift_predictor._min_note: Minimum Q history before ANN trains. Set to 10 so ANN activates within your session length of 10 to 12 readings. Below this, linear regression is used.
ann_drift_predictor._architecture_note: 2 hidden layers x 8 neurons. Inspired by Anderson 2023 Section 6.3 ANN architecture. Adapted for Q-factor drift prediction.
